missing_requirements: NL allows data sync via Wi‑Fi OR Bluetooth (either one sufficient); SysML requires both (no either/or allowance).
partial_or_weakened: Connectivity semantics altered: NL: 'Wi‑Fi or Bluetooth' (disjunctive). SysML RQ_008/C_008 requires both wifi_support and ble_support (conjunctive) — stricter, not equivalent.
extraneous_sysml: RQ_001 / C_001: specific maximum external dimensions (200×80×30 mm) and mass ≤400 g — NL only required 'handheld' (no numeric size/mass).
RQ_002 / C_002: explicit PM2.5 numeric range (0–1000 µg/m³), resolution (1 µg/m³) and accuracy (±10% over 0–500) — NL only requested PM2.5 measurement capability (no ranges/resolution/accuracy).
RQ_003 / C_003: explicit CO2 numeric range (400–5000 ppm), resolution (1 ppm) and dual accuracy thresholds (≤50 ppm and ≤3%) — NL only requested CO2 measurement capability.
RQ_004 / C_004: explicit temperature numeric range (-20–60 °C), resolution (0.1 °C) and accuracy (±0.5 °C) — not specified in NL.
RQ_005 / C_005: explicit RH numeric range (0–100% RH), resolution (0.1%) and accuracy (±3% RH) — not specified in NL.

RQ_007 / C_007: USB‑C charging, full recharge ≤4 h and minimum cycle life 300 cycles — NL only stated 'rechargeable battery' and 8 h runtime; connector, recharge time and cycle life are unstated extras.
RQ_009 / C_009: local data logging requirement (≥7 days at 1 Hz, timestamping, export via wireless) — NL did not require local logging, storage duration, sample rate, or timestamp/export behavior.
RQ_010 / C_010: requirement for a real‑time numeric display and status LEDs — NL did not specify any UI/display requirements.
RQ_008 / C_008: specific wireless standards mandated (Wi‑Fi 2.4 GHz 802.11b/g/n and Bluetooth LE 5.0) — NL only generically said Wi‑Fi or Bluetooth, without bands/standards.
translation_report.coverage_notes: The SysML model covers the core NL items (handheld form factor, sensors for PM2.5/CO2/temperature/humidity, ≥8 h runtime, rechargeable battery, wireless connectivity) but is substantially more prescriptive: it adds numeric size/weight limits, detailed sensor ranges/resolutions/accuracies, charging connector/time and cycle‑life, local logging, UI, and mandates both Wi‑Fi and BLE (contradicting the NL's 'or'). Recommend aligning connectivity semantics (allow either vs require both) and removing or justifying extraneous numeric/feature additions not present in the NL requirements.

partial_or_weakened: Runtime while wireless syncing: RQ_006 text requires 'continuous measurement and wireless syncing between full charges' but C_006 only enforces runtime_hours >= 8.0 — model does not ensure 8 hours while actively performing wireless sync (no energy budget/operational-mode linkage).

PM2.5 accuracy scope: RQ_002 text specifies accuracy '+/-10% over 0.0 to 500.0 µg/m^3' but C_002 only constrains pm_acc_pct <= 10.0 without tying that accuracy requirement specifically to the 0–500 µg/m^3 subrange.

CO2 accuracy logic: RQ_003 text requires accuracy '+/-50 ppm OR +/-3% whichever is greater' but C_003 requires both co2_acc_ppm <= 50.0 AND co2_acc_pct <= 3.0 (overconstrained / not implementing the 'whichever is greater' semantics).

Wireless-synchronization interpretation: NL phrasing 'syncs data via Wi‑Fi or Bluetooth' is ambiguous; C_008 encodes (wifi_support) OR (ble_support) which allows only one. If the NL intended support for both protocols, the model is weaker; if NL intended either, model is OK — ambiguity not resolved in the model.
extraneous_sysml: RQ_007 / C_007: USB-C charging, full recharge within 4.0 hours, minimum cycle life 300 cycles — not specified in NL.
RQ_009 / C_009: Local data logging capable of storing >=7 days at 1 Hz with timestamping and export — not specified in NL.
RQ_010 / C_010: User interface requiring real-time numeric display and status LEDs — not specified in NL.
RQ_001 / C_001: Specific maximum external dimensions (200×80×30 mm) and mass ≤400 g — NL only said 'handheld', did not mandate numeric size/mass limits.
translation_report.coverage_notes: All NL functional clauses (measure PM2.5, CO2, temperature, humidity; 8-hour runtime; rechargeable battery; Wi‑Fi/BLE sync) are present in the SysML model, but the model adds several unrequested specifics (charging type/time, cycle life, local logging, UI, exact form-factor numbers). Important mismatches: CO2 'whichever is greater' logic is not implemented, PM2.5 accuracy is not scoped to the stated subrange, and the runtime constraint does not guarantee 8 hours while wirelessly syncing (no coupling between runtime and wireless operation).
